notes_for_consumers: Brand baseline cue layer; resolves when a lane is not authored. The RAM owner is an established American homeowner with land, equity, and active outdoor and project habits; the default cue layer ignores region and uses national deterministic signal only. Settings-and-objects only; no casting (no people in any cell output). The audience here is Proud Workhorses, the current core.

content.lane_note: National baseline. Established American homeowner with land, equity, active outdoor and project habits.

settings.cue: Lumberyard, home-improvement retail (Home Depot, Lowe's), feed and farm-supply store
Boat launch, lake or river access
Hunting camp, deer lease, duck blind setting

objects.cue: Riding mower, John Deere or comparable brand
Outboard motor, fishing gear (rods, tackle, cooler)
Hunting equipment (rifle case, decoys, blind bag, orange vest in fall)
Workshop tools: radial arm saw, drill press, welding rig, generator
Firewood, lumber, building materials in the bed
Utility trailer, equipment trailer, livestock trailer
Working dogs (in frame as cargo, not as casting)

signifiers.cue: Visible work attire (Carhartt, hi-vis, steel-toed boots, work gloves) staged near the truck
Trailer hitch in use, tow setup engaged
Mud, dust, dirt on the truck as truthful evidence of use (not styling)

excluded_by_relevance_test: Sweet tea, beer brand, sports team gear
